Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}That was my name for a time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I am merely a harbinger of the Fall... Or perhaps I should say "former" harbinger.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}There is no longer a distinction to be made between Nyx and myself...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 2 25 25}Still, I don't regret my decision. We're taking you down, no matter what you are![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I see... Then, you must already understand.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}What people fear the most... What they try to turn away from...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}That is the wretched thing I have become.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 2 25 25}It's the one absolute for all living things.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Then, you must also understand that it is futile to resist.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Will you still face me? Surely there must be fear in your hearts.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 2 25 25}But who gives a shit!? I've got too much to live for![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 2 25 25}Living means looking death square in the face...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 8 25 25}Even if I have to sacrifice myself, I will stop you. This is my choice![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 2 25 25}I'm also sensing multiple Shadows approaching from the lower floors![n]{f 1 1}
